_comment: PubMed verification cache for the What's New pipeline. Built ONCE with live PubMed MCP access (DOI->PMID, else exact-title->PMID, then title-match confirmation via get_article_metadata). Makes every subsequent build deterministic + offline. Source attribution: PubMed (NLM). Keyed by the briefing study `id` (kebab of acronym, or title slug when no acronym) because briefing URLs almost never carry a DOI. status='verified' => a real PMID whose title matches the briefing study (same intervention/topic). status='quarantine' => no PMID resolved, or the resolved title clearly mismatched (preprint/protocol/review/different-topic/conference-late-breaker).

atlas.verifiedTitle: Endovascular thrombectomy for patients with large-core ischaemic stroke presenting up to 24 h after onset (ATLAS): a systematic review and individual patient data meta-analysis with central imaging adjudication.

trident.verifiedTitle: Three Low-Dose Antihypertensive Agents in a Single Pill after Intracerebral Hemorrhage.

tapis.verifiedTitle: Ticagrelor with aspirin dual antiplatelet therapy combined with intravenous thrombolysis in patients with ischaemic stroke in China (TAPIS): a multicentre, double-blind, randomised controlled trial.

efficacy-and-safety-of-the-d1-receptor-a.verifiedTitle: Efficacy and Safety of Ecopipam for Tourette Syndrome: A Phase 3 Randomized Clinical Trial.

choice-2.verifiedTitle: Adjunctive Intra-Arterial Alteplase After Successful Thrombectomy for Acute Ischemic Stroke: The CHOICE-2 Randomized Clinical Trial.

escape-mevo.verifiedTitle: Reperfusion Therapy in ESCAPE-MeVO Trial Participants: Imaging Characteristics and Clinical Outcomes.

association-of-microplastics-and-nanopla.verifiedTitle: Micro- and Nanoplastics as a Potential Risk Factor for Stroke: A Systematic Review.

safety-and-efficacy-of-glycoprotein-vi-i.verifiedTitle: Glenzocimab Efficacy and Safety Added to Intravenous Thrombolysis With or Without Mechanical Thrombectomy in Patients With Acute Ischemic Stroke-ACTISAVE: A Prospective, Randomized, Double-Blind Study.

distal.verifiedTitle: Endovascular treatment for medium or distal vessel occlusion stroke (DISTAL): 12-month outcomes of a multicentre, open-label, randomised trial.

cerebral-edema-in-patients-with-large-is.verifiedTitle: Cerebral Edema in Patients With Large Ischemic Core After Thrombectomy: A Secondary Analysis of SELECT2 Randomized Trial.

early-versus-delayed-anticoagulation-acc.verifiedTitle: Early Versus Delayed Anticoagulation in Acute Ischemic Stroke According to Atrial Fibrillation Subtype and Time of Diagnosis: Subgroup Analysis of the OPTIMAS Randomized Controlled Trial.

endovascular-thrombectomy-in-patients-wi.verifiedTitle: Endovascular Thrombectomy in Patients With Largest Baseline Infarcts (ASPECTS 0-2): An Ancillary Analysis of the LASTE Trial.

increased-risk-of-ischemic-events-in-str.verifiedTitle: Increased Risk of Ischemic Events in Patients With Stroke Treated With Clopidogrel and a P-CAB or PPI.

rescue-intravenous-tirofiban-after-tenec.verifiedTitle: Intravenous Tirofiban After Tenecteplase in Acute Ischemic Stroke: The INSTANT Randomized Clinical Trial.

thrombolysis-to-puncture-time-determines.verifiedTitle: Thrombolysis-to-Puncture Time Determines the Differential Effect of Tenecteplase Versus Alteplase in Large Vessel Occlusion.

evatrisp.verifiedTitle: Characteristics of Unsuccessful Recanalization Following Endovascular Thrombectomy: Cohort Study (EVATRISP Collaboration).

intracranial-hemorrhage-patterns-and-fun.verifiedTitle: Outcomes After Minor Ischemic Stroke in Older Patients Treated With IV Thrombolysis vs Standard of Care in the TEMPO-2 Trial.

ai-derived.verifiedTitle: AI-Derived LA Volume Index, LA/RA and LA/LV Volume Ratios From Coronary Artery Calcium Scans Predict Long-Term Atrial Fibrillation and Stroke.

stop-cad.verifiedTitle: Recurrent Cervical Artery Dissection Prevalence and Predictors: A Secondary Analysis of the STOP-CAD Study.

efficacy-and-safety-of-frexalimab-in-rel.reason: No matching PMID for the frexalimab relapsing-MS efficacy/safety RCT. Closest PubMed hit (PMID 41780470) is a PROMIS-fatigue questionnaire psychometric validation within a phase 2 frexalimab trial — not the efficacy/safety study described; source URL is the NEJM homepage.

endovascular-thrombectomy-versus-standar.reason: No matching PMID for an isolated-ACA-occlusion EVT vs medical-management study. Closest hit (PMID 42170138) is a Cureus single case report on distal ACA occlusion masquerading as MCA syndrome — different design/topic; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

intravenous-tenecteplase-prior-to-endova.reason: No matching PMID for 'TNK-PLUS' (IV tenecteplase before EVT at 4.5-24 h, anterior circulation). Closest hit (PMID 41946560) is the ATTENTION LATE study PROTOCOL for basilar-artery occlusion bridging — protocol, different population; source URL is the JAMA homepage.

intravenous-glibenclamide-biib093-for-ce.reason: No matching PMID for 'the CHARM trial' (IV glibenclamide/BIIB093 for cerebral oedema after large hemispheric stroke). Closest hit (PMID 40066941) is a 2025 Cochrane systematic review on sulfonylureas in severe hemispheric stroke — different study type; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

impact-of-ultra-early-perioperative-anti.reason: No matching PMID resolved by title or broadened topic queries (ultra-early perioperative antihypertensive therapy on hematoma expansion in acute ICH); source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

feasibility-of-real-time-fmri-neurofeedb.reason: Closest match (PMID 39802782, DOI 10.1101/2025.01.03.25319980) is a medRxiv PREPRINT, not a peer-reviewed PubMed journal article; briefing claims Stroke (June 2026). Not displayed pending a published, indexed version.

objective-handgrip-strength-walking-pace.reason: No matching PMID for grip-strength/walking-pace and new-onset stroke in UK Biobank. Closest broad hit (PMID 42133910) concerns physical frailty and EPILEPSY incidence — different outcome; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

improvements-in-time-sensitive-stroke-ca.reason: No matching PMID resolved for a standardized national code-stroke program improving time-sensitive metrics; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

advances-in-secondary-prevention-after-i.reason: Ambiguous. Closest hit (PMID 41706824) is 'ESO annual stroke evidence update 2025' (Eur Stroke J) — a general annual update, not a secondary-prevention-specific synthesis. Quarantined conservatively (topic mismatch).

advances-in-neurorehabilitation-robotics.reason: No matching PMID for an annual neurorehabilitation/robotics/VR evidence synthesis. Closest hit (PMID 42160573) is a J Pak Med Assoc commentary on non-invasive brain stimulation — different scope; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

hope.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); not indexed in PubMed. The HOPE reperfusion-guided BP trial did not resolve to a PMID.

chill-art.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'CHILL-ART' intra-arterial hypothermia trial not indexed in PubMed.

focus.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'FOCUS' selective intra-arterial cooling trial not indexed in PubMed.

gallop-2.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'GALLOP-2' GLP-1 RA post-thrombectomy trial not indexed in PubMed.

cases.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'CASES' immediate carotid stenting trial not indexed in PubMed (only unrelated older articles match).

distals.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'DISTALS' Tigertriever13 trial not indexed in PubMed (only unrelated older articles match).

excoa-cvt.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'EXCOA-CVT' extended anticoagulation for CVT trial not indexed in PubMed.

covasc-ich.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'COVASC-ICH' colchicine peri-hematomal edema trial not indexed in PubMed.

sister.reason: No matching PMID for 'SISTER' (tenecteplase vs alteplase RCT). The known SISTER trial (TS23 late-window reperfusion) is still recruiting (NCT05948566); the briefing's TNK-vs-alteplase 'SISTER' did not resolve to a published PMID; source URL is the JAMA Neurology homepage.

step-mild.reason: No matching PMID for 'STEP-Mild' (tenecteplase in minor non-disabling AIS). Closest hit (PMID 41130214) is a 'Thirty years of IV thrombolysis' historical review — not the trial; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

saturn.reason: Closest hit (PMID 40886018) is the SATURN MRI study PROTOCOL (ancillary study), not the SATURN results RCT (statin discontinuation after lobar ICH) the briefing describes; source URL is the NEJM homepage.

aspire.reason: Closest hit (PMID 40401653) is a narrative review of oral anticoagulation after intracranial hemorrhage in AF, not the 'ASPIRE' RCT on optimal anticoagulation restart timing; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

clarity.reason: Conference late-breaker (ESOC 2026); 'CLARITY' CTA-based thrombolysis-selection trial not indexed in PubMed.

intercept.reason: No matching PMID for 'INTERCEPT' (DAPT in symptomatic high-grade intracranial atherosclerotic stenosis); source URL is the AHA journals homepage.

tele-rehab-2.reason: Closest hit (PMID 42117778) is the RETAKE RCT (vocational return-to-work rehabilitation), not 'TELE-REHAB-2' home telerehabilitation; source URL is the Lancet homepage.

minute.reason: No matching PMID for 'MINUTE' (MRI-based thrombolysis in unknown-onset stroke); only unrelated older articles match; source URL is the Lancet Neurology homepage.

sirius-spine.reason: No matching PMID for 'The SIRIUS-Spine Study'. Closest hit (PMID 42202657) is a generic systematic review/meta-analysis on decompression timing in complete traumatic SCI — not the named study; source URL is the Lancet Neurology homepage.

efficacy-and-safety-of-pitolisant-in-ped.reason: Closest hit (PMID 41324388) is a meta-analysis of pitolisant for excessive daytime sleepiness in narcolepsy AND OSA in adults — not a pediatric-narcolepsy RCT; source URL is the Lancet Neurology homepage.

fit.reason: No matching PMID for the 'Flying Intervention Team (FIT)' mobile-stroke-unit diagnostic-accuracy study; source URL is the AHA journals homepage.
